---
title: "Classification II"
subtitle: "Support vector machines"
date: "Oct 2, 2026"
date-format: long
---

Maximum margin classifiers; the soft-margin extension; kernel SVMs for non-linear decision boundaries.

📖 **Assigned reading:** ISLR ch. 9

---

## 📊 Slides

- 🖥️ [Clean slides](slides_clean.pdf)
- ✏️ [Annotated slides](slides_annotated.pdf)  *(in-class version)*

## 📚 Readings

- 📄 [Jones and Farrow (2025)](readings/Jones and Farrow (2025).pdf)

## 🧪 Lab

In-class walkthrough — open the rendered lab in a new tab. The R Markdown source is provided so you can run the code yourself in RStudio.

- 🧪 [class6 lab1 (HTML)](code/class6_lab1.html){target="_blank"}
- 🧪 [lab1 (HTML)](code/lab1.html){target="_blank"}
- 📝 [Lab source (lab1.Rmd)](code/lab1.Rmd)
- 📝 [Lab source (lab1.R)](code/lab1.R)

## 💻 Code

**Figure scripts** — reproduce each figure from the slides:

- 📈 [fig1.R](code/fig1.R)
- 📈 [fig2.R](code/fig2.R)
- 📈 [fig3.R](code/fig3.R)

**Interactive demos** — Shiny apps (run locally with `shiny::runApp()`):

- 🎛️ [app1.R](code/app1.R)

## 🗂️ Data

- 📊 [iris.csv](data/iris.csv)
